model.label: Qwen 3 Max
model.description: Alibaba • Suitable for complex tasks, with the strongest capabilities.

pick.rationale: TCU enters the matchup with significantly stronger advanced metrics, ranking 43rd on KenPom and 48th on Torvik, driven by an elite defense (top 30 nationally) and solid offensive efficiency. Ohio State lacks available ratings data in either system, suggesting a weaker statistical profile despite its Big Ten affiliation and No. 8 seed. While seed lines imply parity, TCU’s proven performance against Big 12 competition and superior underlying numbers give them a credible edge in this single-elimination setting.

reasoningStep.title: Compare team quality via advanced metrics and context
reasoningStep.summary: TCU has strong, available advanced ratings; Ohio State's are missing, implying a lower-tier profile.
evidence: TCU ranks 43rd (KenPom) and 48th (Torvik) with top-30 defense
Ohio State has no listed ratings in either system
TCU finished 22–11 in the competitive Big 12
Ohio State is making its first tournament appearance since 2022 as an 8-seed

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

result.title: Ohio State Selected as a No. 8-Seed in NCAA Tournament
result.snippet: Ohio State is making its 32nd NCAA Tournament appearance and first since 2022. Overall, the Buckeyes are 52-30 in NCAA Tournament games, with one national title in 1960. The Buckeyes have finished as NCAA Runners-up four times (1939, 1961, 1962 and 2007) and have been to 10 Final Fours, 14 NCAA Sweet 16s and 14 Elite Eights.

result.title: Ohio State March Madness history, record and results - Buckeyes Wire
result.snippet: A look at Ohio State's NCAA Tournament history, with stats , team records and results.

result.title: Let's Dance: Ohio State tapped as eight seed in NCAA Tournament, ends 3 ...
result.snippet: Ohio State ended a three-year NCAA Tournament drought with its selection to the 2026 tournament . The eighth-seeded Buckeyes will play No. 9 seed TCU on Thursday in Greenville, S.C.

result.title: Ohio State punches ticket to NCAA Tournament as No. 8 seed
result.snippet: COLUMBUS — For the first time in four seasons, Ohio State has punched a ticket to the NCAA Tournament : the Buckeyes are officially in the Big Dance. Ohio State will be the No. 8 seed in the East Region of the 2026 NCAA Tournament and will travel to Greenville, South Carolina for the Round of 64 ...

result.title: Ohio State March Madness opponent is TCU in 2026 NCAA bracket
result.snippet: It's Ohio State basketball vs. TCU in March Madness to open its 2026 NCAA tournament men's bracket. Here's what to know about the first-round game in Greenville, South Carolina.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
Bracket config id: demo-2026-bracket
Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: r64-east-2
Current game label: East 8/9
Round: Round of 64
Resolved teams: Ohio State (ohio-state) vs TCU (tcu)
Prior committed picks: 5
